questions.question: How many HPSA entities have a degree of shortage greater than '3'?
questions.reasoning: This query counts Hpsa entities. It uses a FILTER to select entities where the 'degree_of_shortage' attribute, when treated as a string for comparison, is greater than '3'. This fulfills the single-entity with FILTER and aggregation requirements. Note the use of STR() for comparison as the attribute is defined as string, but the question implies a numeric comparison.

questions.question: How many Health Professional Shortage Areas are associated with each State, where the HPSA has a 'Primary Care' discipline class?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?stateName (COUNT(?hpsa) AS ?hpsaCount)
FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-hrsa-hpsa>
WHERE {
  ?hpsa <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/HealthProfessionalShortageArea> .
  ?hpsa <https://omnix.dev/onto/state_name> ?state .
  ?state <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/State> .
  ?state <https://omnix.dev/types/State/attrs/name> ?stateName .
  ?hpsa <https://omnix.dev/types/HealthProfessionalShortageArea/attrs/hpsa_discipline_class> "Primary Care" .
}
GROUP BY ?stateName
ORDER BY DESC(?hpsaCount)
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate
questions.expected_answer:
Wisconsin | 389
Puerto Rico | 140
Wyoming | 103
West Virginia | 43
U.S. Virgin Islands | 14
Federated States of Micronesia | 10
Northern Mariana Islands | 4
Republic of Palau | 3
Marshall Islands | 2
American Samoa | 2
... (12 total rows)
questions.reasoning: This query joins HealthProfessionalShortageArea and State entities using the `state_name` relationship. It filters HealthProfessionalShortageArea entities by `hpsa_discipline_class` being 'Primary Care' and then groups by the state name to count the number of associated HPSAs. This meets the T3 requirements: two distinct entity types, one relationship, and a filter on an attribute of one of the entities, combined with a GROUP BY aggregation.

questions.question: Count the number of Health Professional Shortage Areas for each County, where the HPSA has a 'Designated' status.
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?countyName (COUNT(?hpsa) AS ?hpsaCount)
FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-hrsa-hpsa>
WHERE {
  ?hpsa <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/HealthProfessionalShortageArea> .
  ?hpsa <https://omnix.dev/onto/common_county_name> ?county .
  ?county <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/County> .
  ?county <https://omnix.dev/types/County/attrs/name> ?countyName .
  ?hpsa <https://omnix.dev/types/HealthProfessionalShortageArea/attrs/hpsa_status> "Designated" .
}
GROUP BY ?countyName
ORDER BY DESC(?hpsaCount)
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate
questions.expected_answer:
Milwaukee County | 11
Grant County | 10
Juneau County | 8
Fremont County | 6
Monroe County | 5
Jefferson County | 5
Guam | 4
Barron County | 4
Laramie County | 4
Sawyer County | 4
... (193 total rows)
questions.reasoning: This query connects HealthProfessionalShortageArea and County entities using the `common_county_name` relationship. It filters HPSAs by their `hpsa_status` being 'Designated' and then groups the results by county name to count the HPSAs. This adheres to the T3 criteria: two distinct entity types, one relationship, and a filter on an attribute of one entity, combined with a GROUP BY aggregation.

questions.question: How many Health Professional Shortage Areas are associated with each Organization?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?organizationName (COUNT(?hpsa) AS ?hpsaCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-hrsa-hpsa> WHERE {
  ?hpsa <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/HealthProfessionalShortageArea> .
  ?hpsa <https://omnix.dev/onto/bhcmis_organization_identification_number> ?organization .
  ?organization <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/Organization> .
  ?organization <https://omnix.dev/types/Organization/attrs/name> ?organizationName .
} GROUP BY ?organizationName
ORDER BY DESC(?hpsaCount)
LIMIT 10
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate
questions.reasoning: This query joins `HealthProfessionalShortageArea` and `Organization` entities using the `bhcmis_organization_identification_number` relationship. It counts the number of HPSAs for each organization, satisfying the two-entity join requirement and the GROUP BY aggregation. Both entity types are explicitly typed with `rdf:type`.
